title: Just Graves
description: JustGraves lets players keep their items and XP after death with easy-to-use graves.
body:
# JustGraves

**Version:** 1.0.0
**Fabric:** 1.21.8-1.21.10  
**Dependency:** [Collective](https://modrinth.com/mod/collective) >=8.8  

---

## Overview

JustGraves adds a simple yet powerful grave system to Minecraft that saves a player's inventory and XP upon death and allows them to retrieve it later.  

With **Collective** integration, even complex inventories are reliably serialized and restored. The mod is fully compatible with both server and client environments and integrates seamlessly into vanilla gameplay.

---

## Features

- 🪦 **Grave System:** Stores XP and inventory on player death.  
- ⏱️ **Protection Time:** Graves can be protected for a configurable time before others can loot them.  
- 📜 **Grave Command:** `/graves` lists all your graves with locations and timestamps.  
- 🔄 **Loot & XP Recovery:** Players can reclaim their items and XP after death.  
- 🎵 **Sound & Feedback:** Visual and audio cues when opening a grave.  
- 🔗 **Collective Integration:** Uses Collective for reliable item serialization.  
- 🛠️ **Easy Configuration:** Protection times and messages can be adjusted in the config files.  

---

## Installation

1. Install [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/) (>=0.15.0).  
2. Install [Fabric API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-api).  
3. Install [Collective](https://modrinth.com/mod/collective) (>=8.8).  
4. Place the `JustGraves` mod file in your `mods` folder.  
5. Launch Minecraft with Fabric.  

---

## Configuration

- Default grave protection time: configurable via `GRAVE_PROTECTION_TIME`.  
- Messages and chat formatting can be customized in the mod files.  
- Fully server-synced; no additional plugins required.  

---

## Commands

- `/graves` – Shows a list of all your graves with coordinates and timestamps.  

---

## FAQ

**Q: Is Collective required?**  
A: Yes, JustGraves depends on Collective for proper item storage. Without it, the mod will not work.  

**Q: Can I loot other players' graves?**  
A: Only after the protection time has expired or if you are the owner.  

**Q: Is the mod multiplayer-friendly?**  
A: Yes, JustGraves works fully on multiplayer servers.  

---

## License

JustGraves is **MIT licensed**, with the note that it is an addon for **Collective**.  
See LICENSE for details.

---

## Changelog

**1.0.0**  
- Initial release  
- Core grave and XP system  
- `/graves` command  
- Collective integration  

---
